UCH2 protos B

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference UCH2_protos_B.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol ISO8
Baudrate N/A
Send ID N/A
Receive ID N/A
Functional Addr AE
Functional Name UCBIC ISO8
